steps.name: Keymap primitives in Lisp bridge
criteria: make-keymap primitive creates a named keymap
define-key primitive binds key sequence to command
set-active-keymap primitive activates a keymap
Keymap operations accessible from Lisp code
Invalid key specs return error messages

steps.name: Keymap-based key dispatch in event loop
criteria: Event loop resolves keys through active keymap
Keymap match executes the bound command
Unbound keys fall through without error
No hardcoded key handlers remain in Rust
Command mode colon still works via keymap

steps.name: Basic keybinding plugin in Alfred Lisp
criteria: Plugin in plugins/basic-keybindings/init.lisp loads
Arrow keys navigate via plugin-defined bindings
Character insertion works for printable keys
Backspace deletes character before cursor
Colon enters command mode via plugin binding

steps.name: Remove hardcoded keybindings from Rust
criteria: No hardcoded key matching in app.rs handle_key_event
All navigation via keymap-resolved commands
Removing plugin means no keybindings work
Editor starts but keys have no effect without plugin
Existing tests updated to use keymap dispatch
